=== Secure Boot check ===
mokutil --sb-state → SecureBoot enabled

=== nvidia module signature (35 kernel) ===
modinfo /lib/modules/6.17.0-35-generic/kernel/nvidia-580srv/nvidia.ko | grep -E 'sig_|signer'
sig_id:         PKCS#7
signer:         Canonical Ltd. Kernel Module Signing
sig_key:        E9:DF:13:0F:92:92:A9:B7
sig_hashalgo:   sha512

=== MOK enrolled keys ===
mokutil --list-enrolled → Canonical Ltd. Master Certificate Authority
# Signature chain is valid — Secure Boot is NOT the cause

=== nvidia-kms.conf (corrupted) ===
# This file was generated by nvidia-prime
# Set value to 1 to enable modesetting
options nvidia-drm modeset=1options nvidia "NVreg_DynamicPowerManagement=0x02"
# Note: "modeset=1options" — two lines concatenated, parameter parsing broken

=== nvidia-runtimepm.conf ===
options nvidia "NVreg_DynamicPowerManagement=0x02"
